## Week in Review: 2026-05-25 to 2026-05-31

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 11.3.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 3.9 (+3.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.04)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 4.3 (+20.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.50)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 2.7 (+35.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.17)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 11.3 (-14.1% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.15)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
